stemHtml: What is mixed ice/opaque ice and where can it be found?

options.a: Mixed ice consists of clear ice and and freezing rain and can be found in CB clouds.
options.b: Mixed ice consists of freezing fog and rime ice and can be found in NS and CB clouds.
options.c: Mixed ice consists of rime ice and hoar frost can be found in CI and AS clouds.
options.d: Mixed ice consists of clear ice and rime ice and can be found in NS clouds.
